purpose: Public-safe status view for the private exact-anchor review packet queue that prepares licensed review of blocked ISO 27001 and SOC 2 control mappings.

nextMilestones: Run licensed exact-anchor review for the currently blocked promoted controls.
Promote only the next claim-schema-complete and fixture-ready controls into the public ontology.
Expand Lean coverage across the remaining decidable atoms after the exact-anchor and claim-schema gates are met.
